main_product.title: 1PC Floating Waterproof Dry Bag 5L/10L/20L/40L/70L, Roll Top Sack Keeps Gear Dry for Kayaking, Rafting, Boating, Swimming, Camping, Hiking, Beach, Fishing

details.title: 1PC Floating Waterproof Dry Bag 5L/10L/20L/40L/70L, Roll Top Sack Keeps Gear Dry for Kayaking, Rafting, Boating, Swimming, Camping, Hiking, Beach, Fishing
details.description:
• 【5000MM+ Waterproof protection】 Our waterproof dry bag is made of 210T polyester taffeta woven, all tape sewn, waterproof effect 5000mm+, keeps your valuables dry and protects there from water, snow, dirt and sand.
  • 【Easy to Fold and Carry】Our dry sack is durable for long time use.   Weight only 100g-150g, this dry bag for water sports is pretty light and easy to carry.   When it's off use, you can fold it into your backpack, very space saving.
  • 【Easy to Use and Clean】Just put your items in the large dry bag, grab top woven tape and roll down tightly 3 to 5 times and then plug buckle to complete seal.   Then you can enjoy your adventures with this roll top compression sack.   Easy to wipe clean due to its smooth surface.
  • 【Multiple Color/Size Choice】You can choose from orange, green, blue and purple.   Any of the bright colors bringing you a bright mood and making your outing or storage room a beautiful scenery.   We have waterproof dry sacks from small to large, ranging from 5L, 10L, 20L, 40L to 70L, meeting all your needs to stay dry and clean.
  • 【Widely Use】Our lightweight dry bags for water sports can float on water after rolled and buckled, so you can track your items easily.   It’s perfect for snowboarding kayaking, fishing, camping or having fun on the beach.   It's also a great way to use waterproof bag to put away out-of-season clothes, shoes,mattress or quilts.   If you buy some 70L waterproof bags, you'll find it's big enough to hold a lot of stuff.

all_reviews.reviewText: I got two bags because they were so inexpensive and I've very pleased.  I got the green small bag and a large one as well.  They're waterproof  so you don't need to use them for just camping.  I've been using my small one for toiletries.  The large bag is what I use to carry my lunch during kayaking trips.  The bag floats so it is perfect for boating.
all_reviews.itemName: 1PC Floating Waterproof Dry Bag 5L/10L/20L/40L/70L, Roll Top Sack Keeps Gear Dry for Kayaking, Rafting, Boating, Swimming, Camping, Hiking, Beach, Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText:
I would have preferred a more normal type handle as it looks in the photo.  It is just a snap clip and not like a handle
Disappointed
all_reviews.itemName: 1PC Floating Waterproof Dry Bag 5L/10L/20L/40L/70L, Roll Top Sack Keeps Gear Dry for Kayaking, Rafting, Boating, Swimming, Camping, Hiking, Beach, Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText: This  material is very thin and doesn't appear to be  waterproof.    I am returning it.  I did-not use it, opened it only.   It's going back to store.
all_reviews.itemName: 1PC Floating Waterproof Dry Bag 5L/10L/20L/40L/70L, Roll Top Sack Keeps Gear Dry for Kayaking, Rafting, Boating, Swimming, Camping, Hiking, Beach, Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText: Items were thin and cheap unable to return because I missed the window and also you cannot return it to walmart.com. You have to go through the seller, which is even more irritating. I will not be ordering from this company ever again.
all_reviews.itemName: 1PC Floating Waterproof Dry Bag 5L/10L/20L/40L/70L, Roll Top Sack Keeps Gear Dry for Kayaking, Rafting, Boating, Swimming, Camping, Hiking, Beach, Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText: Fabric is super thin.  Not sure if this bag will even make it through one trip before it tears.
all_reviews.itemName: 1PC Floating Waterproof Dry Bag 5L/10L/20L/40L/70L, Roll Top Sack Keeps Gear Dry for Kayaking, Rafting, Boating, Swimming, Camping, Hiking, Beach, Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText: Seller wanted me to pay or get partial refund because THEY sent me the wrong item. Poor customer service!
all_reviews.reviewTitle: Poor customer service and sent wrong size!
all_reviews.itemName: 1PC Floating Waterproof Dry Bag 5L/10L/20L/40L/70L, Roll Top Sack Keeps Gear Dry for Kayaking, Rafting, Boating, Swimming, Camping, Hiking, Beach, Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText: I purchased a 70 L and a 40L to use in my ultralight kayak. The 40 L is perfect for clothing and personal items while the 70 L is for my tent, sleeping gear and cooket. Very lightweight and colorful. Not as durable as traditional drybags, but work well when shedding ounces of weight.
all_reviews.itemName: 1PC Floating Waterproof Dry Bag 5L/10L/20L/40L/70L, Roll Top Sack Keeps Gear Dry for Kayaking, Rafting, Boating, Swimming, Camping, Hiking, Beach, Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText: These are for camping hiking picnic and doing an outdoor  type thing if you're looking for something that u would put heavy stuff in these are not for you they're extremely thin they are waterproof but they're very thin and for clothing phones ect...but they are really nice
all_reviews.itemName: 1PC Floating Waterproof Dry Bag 5L/10L/20L/40L/70L, Roll Top Sack Keeps Gear Dry for Kayaking, Rafting, Boating, Swimming, Camping, Hiking, Beach, Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText: These were great but they are for camping I was looking for a bag to put sandbags in to hold pool steps down these absolutely are not what you would use their thin they may be waterproof but they're extremely thin and they are for like clothes or cell phone something like that definitely not for large things but they are great  I did return them because they were not what I was looking for but if you were a camper a hacker someone who is outdoor picnic in things like that these would absolutely be great for things like that
all_reviews.itemName: 1PC Floating Waterproof Dry Bag 5L/10L/20L/40L/70L, Roll Top Sack Keeps Gear Dry for Kayaking, Rafting, Boating, Swimming, Camping, Hiking, Beach, Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText: I ordered a dry bag for my trip to Hawaii said it was going to be here on Monday and I asked him to leave it at my doorstep the email stated that they were supposed to leave it at my mailbox which they never did and I paid for it and never got it
all_reviews.itemName: 1PC Floating Waterproof Dry Bag 5L/10L/20L/40L/70L, Roll Top Sack Keeps Gear Dry for Kayaking, Rafting, Boating, Swimming, Camping, Hiking, Beach, Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText: I bought the 70 and 40 L bags for my kayak. They are lightweight and hold up well with soft items packed inside. Clothes go in the 40 L and my sleeping kit in the 70 L.  Nice bright colors are easy to spot in camp.
all_reviews.itemName: 1PC Floating Waterproof Dry Bag 5L/10L/20L/40L/70L, Roll Top Sack Keeps Gear Dry for Kayaking, Rafting, Boating, Swimming, Camping, Hiking, Beach, Fishing

all_reviews.reviewText: The material is a little thinner than expected, but it is water. The vivid green color will easily catch the eye.
